title: biscutella didyma subsp. lyrata
intro: Biscutella didyma subsp. lyrata, also known as a type of bittercress, is a flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Biscutella didyma subsp. lyrata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas or infusions, and it is also used in some traditional remedies, although its efficacy and safety may require further scientific study.
